executionModel.watch_protocol: every codex launch: status poll until completed/failed/canceled, ≤20min cancel threshold

tasks.subject: Phase 1: Migrations 0157–0168 (enums, tenants, outbox, ledger, exports, reconciliation)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** all schema for Spec 4 in place.

**Files:** migrations/0157_ack_type_enum.sql → 0168_governance_events.sql (12 files).

**Acceptance:** `go run ./apps/api migrate up` clean; smoke test inserts roundtrip for each new table.

```json:metadata
{"files":["migrations/0157_ack_type_enum.sql","migrations/0158_metaldocs_tenants.sql","migrations/0159_controlled_documents_criticality.sql","migrations/0160_process_areas_default_ack_type.sql","migrations/0161_documents_ack_type_distribution_mode.sql","migrations/0162_document_distributions.sql","migrations/0163_distribution_outbox.sql","migrations/0164_distribution_outbox_dlq.sql","migrations/0165_document_exports.sql","migrations/0166_documents_legal_transition_trigger_ext.sql","migrations/0167_distribution_nonces.sql","migrations/0168_governance_events.sql"],"verifyCommand":"go run ./apps/api migrate up && psql -c '\\d+ document_distributions'","acceptanceCriteria":["all 12 migrations apply clean","round-trip insert on each new table"],"model":"gpt-5.3-codex","effort":"medium"}
```

tasks.subject: Phase 2: Domain layer (AckType, CriticalityTier, RevokeReason, ResolveAckType, Nonce, HMAC)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** pure-Go primitives; 7-case policy matrix; ComputeAckSignature returns 64-char hex.

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/modules/distribution/domain/ack_type.go","internal/modules/distribution/domain/criticality.go","internal/modules/distribution/domain/revoke_reason.go","internal/modules/distribution/domain/resolve_ack_type.go","internal/modules/distribution/domain/nonce.go","internal/modules/distribution/domain/signature.go"],"verifyCommand":"rtk go test ./internal/modules/distribution/domain/... -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["7-case ack_type matrix passes","ErrAckTypeLocked surfaced on safety/regulatory attempt","HMAC signature matches golden vector"],"model":"gpt-5.3-codex","effort":"high"}
```

tasks.subject: Phase 3: Outbox + FanoutWorker (advisory-locked per controlled_document_id, backoff + DLQ)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** enqueue/claim via FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED, advisory-lock fan-out, 1m/5m/15m/1h/4h backoff → DLQ after 5.

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/modules/distribution/repository/outbox_repo.go","internal/modules/distribution/repository/distribution_repo.go","internal/modules/distribution/application/fanout_worker.go","internal/modules/distribution/application/fanout_worker_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"rtk go test ./internal/modules/distribution/application/... -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["supersession preserves acked_at","advisory lock serializes rev-N vs rev-N+1","DLQ after 5 fails"],"model":"gpt-5.3-codex","effort":"high"}
```

tasks.description:

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/modules/documents_v2/approval/application/publish_service.go","internal/modules/distribution/application/publish_hook.go","internal/modules/distribution/application/publish_hook_test.go","internal/modules/documents_v2/approval/repository/approval_repository.go"],"verifyCommand":"rtk go test ./internal/modules/documents_v2/approval/... ./internal/modules/distribution/... -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["Spec 2 tests pass unchanged","active mode = 1 row, passive = 0","prior_version_id threaded on supersession"],"model":"gpt-5.3-codex","effort":"high","opusReview":true}
```

tasks.subject: Phase 5: Membership hook — Grant enqueues, Revoke marks non-acked revoke_reason=area_removed
tasks.description:
**Goal:** single SQL per call; idempotent; only pending rows affected on revoke.

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/modules/iam/area_membership/area_membership.go","internal/modules/iam/area_membership/area_membership_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"rtk go test ./internal/modules/iam/area_membership/... -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["Grant enqueues scoped rows per published active doc","Revoke marks pending rows revoked+area_removed","idempotent re-call"],"model":"gpt-5.3-codex","effort":"medium"}
```

tasks.subject: Phase 6: AckService + HTTP handlers (nonce, view ack, signature ack, rate limit, 429/409/410)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 32b base64url nonce, 15min TTL, single-use; password re-auth for signature; rate limit 5 failed/15min/(user,obligation); HTTP error mapping complete.

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/modules/distribution/application/ack_service.go","internal/modules/distribution/application/ack_service_test.go","internal/modules/distribution/delivery/http/ack_handler.go","internal/modules/distribution/delivery/http/ack_handler_test.go","internal/modules/distribution/repository/nonce_repo.go"],"verifyCommand":"rtk go test ./internal/modules/distribution/application/... ./internal/modules/distribution/delivery/... -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["nonce consumed only on success (view) or password-ok (signature)","rate limit triggers 429","ack_signature is 64-char hex"],"model":"gpt-5.3-codex","effort":"high","opusReview":true}
```

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/modules/documents_v2/application/export_service.go","internal/modules/documents_v2/application/export_service_test.go","internal/modules/distribution/repository/exports_repo.go","apps/docgen-v2/src/routes/convert-pdf.ts"],"verifyCommand":"rtk go test ./internal/modules/documents_v2/application/... -count=1 -run Export && rtk pnpm -C apps/docgen-v2 vitest run","acceptanceCriteria":["watermark hash = sha256(text || pdf[:4096])","503 → 0 ledger rows","500 → ledger rolled back"],"model":"gpt-5.3-codex","effort":"high","opusReview":true}
```

tasks.subject: Phase 11: Integration + Load + E2E tests
tasks.description:
